summary: Verified existing review-escalation implementation. After 3 review FAILs, run.mjs:1349-1361 invokes shouldEscalate(task), posts an escalation comment, marks parent checklist blocked, and transitions task.status to 'blocked' with lastReason 'review-escalation: 3 rounds exceeded'. All 580 tests pass including review-escalation.test.mjs:268-271 which asserts both acceptance criteria verbatim.
